## Review checklist

- [ ] Validation is explicit and no unsafe mass assignment was introduced.
- [ ] Authorization is enforced on the backend for sensitive operations.
- [ ] Local and Docker behavior were considered.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for the changed behavior.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where contracts or setup changed.
- [ ] Residual risks or follow-up work are described below.
